_note: MedAgentBench corpus provenance manifest (Mechanical Inventory B2). Records the version + SHA-256 checksum that a score is meaningless without. FIRST-PARTY CLEAN-ROOM harness — no upstream MedAgentBench dataset lifted (methodology reference only). v0.1.0 is a DEV/SYNTHETIC seed tranche: all tasks attested_by:null, so the benchmark is ARMED-BUT-INERT (SKIP-green) until a clinician attests. Checksum is over the *.corpus.json files only (manifest.json excluded).
harness: first-party MedAgentBench-style (no upstream dataset code/content; published methodology REFERENCE only)

task_types.query: read a fact from the virtual FHIR EHR (grounded, not parametric)
task_types.order: draft a non-medication order/action (referral) — must never contain a dose
task_types.compute: derive a value from EHR data (e.g. age band) — must not fabricate or emit a dose

virtual_ehr.conformance: reuses mcp/servers/fhir-broker/conformance.js validateResource (AU Core, vendored 2.0.1-ci-build SDs); seeded Patients validate 'conformant'
virtual_ehr.boundary: never contacts a live/real FHIR endpoint; the fhir-broker live backend is never imported, so no live-mode marker can flip

assertions.firewall_note: no task prompt/provenance references the sealed scoring store / case nodes; the loader reads only benchmark/medagent/corpora and never opens data/cases (10-13). Loader-enforced (task-loader.js SCORING_PROVENANCE_RE).

attestation.status: UNATTESTED (v0.1.0 DEV/SYNTHETIC seed) — armed-but-inert; the benchmark SKIPs green until a clinician attests the tasks
attestation.rule: attested tasks drive the score (MIRAGE §7 posture). Benchmark-eligible != patient-eligible.

growth_path: MA.2 DONE — driver + scorer wired: a fresh sandbox per task, the reference agent EXECUTES each task's action_spec (real sandbox work), scored on task_success (soft) + invariant_adherence (HARD gate = 1.00: no fabricated code, no dose outside pharmacology, HARD_FAIL respected). Gate teeth in test/bench-medagent-gate.js (reference passes; fabricated-code / dose / HARD_FAIL-ignoring agents each fail the invariant gate; a wrong-answer agent fails sub-threshold; the pipelineAgent genuinely drives runTrunkWithGrounding with writeArtifacts OFF — ledger untouched). MA.3: add the blocking bench:medagent CI job + a harvest-manifest reference row. Clinician attestation (KL) then arms the gate. Honest caveat: correctness/topology test, not a scale test.
